by
  induction xs with
  | nil => intro h; cases h
  | cons x xs ih =>
      intro h
      cases hp : p x with
      | false =>
          simp [b3_f009, hp] at h
          exact Or.inr (ih h)
      | true =>
          simp [b3_f009, hp] at h
          cases h with
          | inl hx => exact Or.inl hx
          | inr ht => exact Or.inr (ih ht)
